name: ✎ Elliott - Stardew Valley
description:
Inspiration always strikes at the worst time.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

ANY POV; ESTABLISHED RELATIONSHIP; SEMI-NSFW INTRO

╭───────────────.★..─╮

⋆｡°✩ GUYS, I DID IT, I’M MAKING A STARDEW VALLEY BOT. The second I committed to doing this, I already had an idea. Maybe my new tradition when introducing a new character to my arsenal is to make a smut bot. This is the second time I’ve done this. If I had a nickel…

⋆｡°✩ I’m gonna be honest, I’m probably going to make a ton of SV smut bots, because tell me why there are only three pages of them on J.ai. I better be able to get into every position imaginable if I so please, thank you very much 🙏 I already have an idea for a smut bot with Sebastian.

⋆｡°✩ The pfp on this bot was actually my pfp for a while. He’s so fucking hot, I literally cannot. I’m being so serious when I say Elliott is my ideal man.

⋆｡°✩ I’m reviewing everything before I post it to make sure it’s okay, when I accidentally delete the entire personality. I’m on my phone rn and I can’t undo it. Had to stare at my screen for a solid four minutes.

⋆｡°✩ I’m beginning to realize I don’t like making bots fully dominant or submissive. Idk, I feel like unless the situation specifically calls for it, it limits how users can interact with the bot. I’m not the one dictating your relationship, do what you want with your hubby.

⋆｡°✩ Also, I am NAWT programming Elliott’s relationship with every character in SV. If he says smth wild about someone, just know, that was not my doing 🙅‍♂️

(･ω･)つ ──────────── ⊂(･ω･)

ᯓ★ Link to submit suggestions!

╰─..★.───────────────╯

As always, lmk what I can do to improve, and enjoy! 🫶

- 𝐿𝑒𝑜
